command.neotab.player_only: This command can only be used by a player.
message.neotab.no_permission: You do not have permission to configure NeoTab.
screen.neotab.title: NeoTab Server Config
screen.neotab.top.title: Title Information
screen.neotab.top.title.tooltip: Set the top title text shown in the tab header. Maximum length: 32 characters.
screen.neotab.top.content.tooltip: Set the top content text shown under the title. Maximum length: 256 characters (excluding rich text tags).
screen.neotab.list.title: Title Feature
screen.neotab.list.title.tooltip: When enabled, displays a title before player names. Title text is provided by other mods.
screen.neotab.list.health_display.toolti: When enabled, displays player health with heart icons in the tab list.
screen.neotab.theme.health_mode.tooltip: Full: up to 10 hearts, number shown when over limit. Compact: 1 heart + number, saves space.
screen.neotab.theme.tab_theme.tooltip: Switch the visual theme of the tab list.
screen.neotab.color_picker.title: Choose Color
screen.neotab.custom_theme.title: Custom Theme Configuration
screen.neotab.list.better_ping.tooltip: When enabled, ping text changes color based on latency.
screen.neotab.list.online_duration.note: When enabled, player online duration is shown.
screen.neotab.footer.custom.tooltip: Set extra text shown in the tab footer. Maximum length: 256 characters (excluding rich text tags).
screen.neotab.layout.enabled.tooltip: When enabled, the tab list uses the configured column and row counts, with automatic pagination when players exceed capacity. When disabled, vanilla layout is used.
screen.neotab.layout.columns.tooltip: Number of columns shown in the tab list. Maximum value adjusts dynamically based on GUI scale and health display mode. When players exceed the capacity, pagination is used. Hotkey: TAB+Left/Right arrow keys to navigate pages.
screen.neotab.layout.rows.tooltip: Number of player rows per column. Maximum value adjusts dynamically based on GUI scale. When all players exceed the total capacity (columns × rows), the tab list will paginate. Hotkey: TAB+Left/Right arrow keys to navigate pages.
command.neotab.customize_no_permission: You do not have permission to use personal customization.
screen.neotab.locked_by_server: This option is controlled by the server administrator
screen.neotab.no_permission: You do not have permission to modify this option
screen.neotab.policy.target_list_hint: Target player list (switch to Specific Player mode to use)
screen.neotab.theme.preset_subtitle: Quickly apply a complete visual style
screen.neotab.theme.reset_subtitle: Restore all custom settings to default values
screen.neotab.theme.animation_subtitle: Configure border animation toggle and speed
screen.neotab.theme.color_config_subtitl: Select an item on the left, adjust color with the picker on the right
screen.neotab.theme.health_mode_subtitle: Full: up to 10 hearts | Compact: 1 heart + number
screen.neotab.theme.layout_enabled_subti: Display tab list in multi-column layout with customizable columns and rows
screen.neotab.theme.layout_columns_subti: Number of columns, max value adjusts based on screen width
screen.neotab.theme.layout_rows_subtitle: Number of rows per column, auto-paginate when players exceed capacity
screen.neotab.theme.layout_hint_line1: When players exceed capacity, the tab list will auto-paginate.
screen.neotab.theme.layout_hint_line2: Hotkey: TAB + Left/Right arrow keys to navigate pages.
screen.neotab.permissions.add_player_sub: Set independent customization permissions for specific players
screen.neotab.permissions.player_list_su: Added players and their permission configurations
screen.neotab.permissions.player_list_em: No players added yet, they will appear here once added
screen.neotab.permissions.hint_line1: After adding players, configure their permissions in the list above.
screen.neotab.permissions.apply_subtitle: Click the buttons below to apply current permission configuration
screen.neotab.permissions.item.top_title: Allow players to toggle top title display
Allow players to customize top title content
screen.neotab.permissions.item.top_conte: Allow players to toggle top content display
Allow players to customize top content text
screen.neotab.permissions.item.ping_togg: Allow players to toggle ping display
screen.neotab.permissions.item.duration_: Allow players to toggle online duration display
screen.neotab.permissions.item.title_tog: Allow players to toggle title feature
screen.neotab.permissions.item.health_to: Allow players to toggle health display
screen.neotab.permissions.item.health_mo: Allow players to change health display mode
screen.neotab.permissions.item.footer_cu: Allow players to customize footer text
screen.neotab.permissions.item.footer_tp: Allow players to toggle TPS display
screen.neotab.permissions.item.footer_ms: Allow players to toggle MSPT display
screen.neotab.permissions.item.footer_on: Allow players to toggle online count display
screen.neotab.permissions.item.theme.too: Allow players to change tab theme
screen.neotab.input.top_title_hint:
Supports rich text tags, e.g. &6Golden Text
Max 32 visible characters
screen.neotab.input.top_content_hint:
Supports placeholders, e.g. %server_tps%
Max 256 visible characters
screen.neotab.input.footer_custom_hint:
Enter custom text with placeholders
Example: %server_tps%, %online_players%
message.neotab.permissions.no_players_ad: §cPlease add players before applying permission settings
